title: Burano and San Martino with the Leaning Tower | Venice, Italy
tags: italy venice burano tower church island venetianlagoon lagoon europe travel canal boats architecture sanmartino buranoisland
description: The Burano Island is one of the most colourful places that I have ever been to. I later learned that there are specific colours that can only be chosen. In the golden age of development, if you were a house owner in Burano, you could apply to its government to paint your house. The government though, would only give you a few options to choose from. That is why you can enjoy the beauty of this vivid colourful paradise. Do you know of any other such colourful place? ___________________ All rights reserved ___________________ More about this image here

title: Fondamenta de Fazza l'Arsenal (Venise, Italie)
tags: italie venise ville castello sestierecastello matin morning mattino arsenal arsenale arsenaledivenezia arsenaldevenise venetianarsenal venezia veneto it italy italia venice vénétie liondupirée piraeuslion leonedelpiero fondamentadefazzalarsenal pontedelpurgatorio portaditera porteterrestre portamagna
description:
Une des deux entrées qui permettent de se rendre l'entrée de l'arsenal de Venise (Arsenale). La porte a été construite entre 1457 et 1460. L'imposante statue de lion assis est une des deux rapportées en 1692 du port d'Athènes(le Pirée) par Franceso Morosini comme butin suite à la guerre de Morée opposant la République et l'empire ottoman.

One of the two ways to go to the entrance of the Venetian Arsenal (Arsenale). The portale was built between 1457 et 1460. The imposing sitting lion statue is one of the two brought back in 1692 by Francesco Morosini from the Athene harbor (Piraeus) as a loot from the Morean war between the Venetian Republic and the Ottoman Empire.
